title: viola alba var. scotophylla
intro: Viola alba var. scotophylla, also known as the white violet or Scottish-leaved violet, is a variant of the white violet plant, characterized by its heart-shaped leaves and white flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Viola alba var. scotophylla include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Viola alba var. scotophylla can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including insomnia, depression, and digestive disorders.
